post.content:
YOE: 5
Previous Company: FAANG
Location: India
College:  IIIT Hyderabad
Comp: 53LPA
Position: SDE-2

New Comp: 
Base: 81k Euro base
Equity: 115K USD/4 years
Location: Europe
Team: Some Road Safety and Navigation Team
Position: SE-2

Please evaluate, need to act fast. Recruiter has given 3 days to accept/reject offer.
Points to consider: WLB in Uber, PPP etc.

Europe is a big place and cost of living is significantly different between countries, for example Bulgaria and Switzerland are two extreme ends in terms of cost. If you can be more specific it will help on evaluating offer.

In Europe taxes are high . Also those wide roads and clean air will feel good during initial years and after that you have to do all the work yourself. Also there will be loneliness issue as you wont be surrounded by people and people outside dont like to be diturbed. You can certaily move to explore the place .

if money is the priority then u will save more in india(in long run PPP considered) than amsterdam. I would take the offer only because i get to explore europe. Also in amsterdam there are lower taxes for expats for the initial few years. u can expect 4.5k-5k net salary
Congrats OP, please be mindful of the PPP - https://chrislross.com/PPPConverter/\nIs it the Netherlands?
Hi OP, nice offer. Which country? Consider PP while evaluation.
